_about: Durable source of truth for the 2026-REWORKS playlist, read by the skill scripts (run from this research/ dir). Committed with picks.json / overrides.json / curator.json / article.md. Everything else here (verified.json, enriched.json, *_cache.json, ../playlist_items.json) is a regenerated build artifact and is gitignored.

playlist.title: Remix Rave — 2026 Reworks of Pre-'00 Club Classics
playlist.description: Rave / electronic-dance tracks released in 2026 that sample, cover, or remix a track from the 90s or earlier — from New Order and Chaka Khan to Fatboy Slim. Every row Discogs-verified; each pairs 1:1 with the sibling 'Remix Rave — The Originals' playlist. Built with the discogs-playlist skill.
